title: lithophragma campanulatum
intro: Lithophragma campanulatum, also known as Fringecup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lithophragma campanulatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. Lithophragma campanulatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
